model.description: judge model id; defaults to the shape's primary model (the cheapest sentinel resolves at compile time)

criteria.description: what a passing reply must satisfy — the judge scores the final text against this

anyOf.description: model-scored grader: an LLM judges the final text in [0,1] against criteria

value.description: substring the final text must contain (case-sensitive)

anyOf.description: deterministic grader: pass iff the final text contains value

value.description: JavaScript regular expression the final text must match

anyOf.description: deterministic grader: pass iff the final text matches the regex

threshold.description: passing score in 0..1 (default 0.7); llm_judge grader only

on_fail.description: below-threshold behaviour: retry re-prompts with the judge rationale (default), halt aborts the turn classified, note emits a trace event only

max_retries.description: hard cap on evaluation-triggered retries per turn (default 1)

evaluation.description: in-loop output evaluation: score each completed assistant turn and retry/halt/note below threshold

criteria.description: what a passing upstream output must satisfy — the judge scores against this

model.description: judge model id; defaults to the shape's top-level model

on_fail.description: below-threshold behaviour: retry_previous re-runs the gated step/node (default), halt aborts classified, continue records the verdict and proceeds

max_retries.description: hard cap on judge-triggered re-runs of the gated step/node (default 1)

judge.description: judge gate config for kind: judge workflow steps and graph nodes

anyOf.description: judge gate step: scores the previous step's output instead of running an agent turn

appToken.description: reserved for a future Socket Mode path; parsed but unused by the v0 webhook daemon

anyOf.description: judge gate node: scores the upstream node's output instead of running an agent turn
